title: skills.sh repo page configuration
description: Configuration for customizing a repository page on skills.sh. Place this file at the repository root as skills.sh.json.

$schema.description: JSON schema URL for editor autocomplete and validation.

notGrouped.description: Where to place skills that are not listed in any group.

groupings.description: Sections to show on the repo page.

title.description: The section title shown on the repo page.

description.description: A short sentence that explains what the group is for.

skills.description: Skill names or slugs to include in this group.
